Footer.tagline: On-Device AI digital defense that fuses smart detection, psychological intervention, and social accountability to free students from online gambling.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Gamblock-AI. Built for the Student Creativity Program (PKM).

LandingPage.subtitle: Gamblock-AI is more than a blocker. It's an On-Device AI digital defense ecosystem fusing smart detection, Pattern Interrupt psychological intervention, and social accountability, helping students break free from online gambling without sacrificing privacy.
LandingPage.heroStatLabel: Online gambling money flow in Indonesia throughout 2025.
LandingPage.crisisTitle: Online gambling isn't entertainment. It's a generational crisis.
LandingPage.crisisSubtitle: The data speaks: losses and the number of young victims keep growing. Gamblock-AI is built as a real answer.
LandingPage.problemTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
LandingPage.problemBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government and campus domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance: users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A real solution must unite content-based detection with automatic psychological intervention.
LandingPage.problemPoint1: Static blacklists can't keep up with rotating domains.
LandingPage.problemPoint2: Conventional DNS can't see camouflaged page content.
LandingPage.problemPoint3: Blocking without rehabilitation drives users to workarounds.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: From detection to recovery, every layer works together to close the gaps left by conventional blockers.
LandingPage.f1Title: Reads gambling-site camouflage in real time.
LandingPage.f1Body: Hybrid Analysis combines Rule-Based logic for explicit URL patterns with Logistic Regression that analyses page content (DOM). Text from titles, headings, and anchors becomes a Bag-of-Words vector, accurately separating camouflaged gambling sites from legitimate ones.
LandingPage.f1Bullet2: Minimises false positives on academic & gov sites
LandingPage.f2Title: Interrupts the impulse at the most critical second.
LandingPage.f2Body: When a gambling site is detected, the system doesn't just block. A 5–10 second graphic animation (Pattern Interrupt) appears automatically to break the impulsive response while the brain seeks dopamine, holding the user back before they slip further.
LandingPage.f3Body: The biggest temptation is deleting the app when urges peak. The Social Accountability Protocol requires registered partner approval for every uninstall request (family or peer). This procedural friction keeps users on the recovery path.
LandingPage.f3Bullet3: Group Code links member to partner
LandingPage.f4Body: A Self-Regulation Theory psychoeducation web guides users through intention-setting, impulse-awareness content, a mood tracker, daily missions, and a reflection journal secured with AES-256-GCM encryption.
LandingPage.howStep1Body: Install the lightweight app on Android/Windows, then enter the Group Code from your partner to lock in protection.
LandingPage.howStep2Body: The system runs silently as a background service, analysing page content without sending data off-device.
LandingPage.howStep3Body: On detection, access is blocked instantly, Pattern Interrupt appears, then the user is guided to self-regulation missions.
LandingPage.techTitle: Intelligence that runs inside your device.
LandingPage.techSubtitle: An On-Device AI architecture with the Edge Computing paradigm, all inference runs locally, never sending browsing history to any server.
LandingPage.techCard1Body: No URLs, domains, or history leave the device. Aligned with the data-minimisation principle of Indonesia's Data Privacy Law.
LandingPage.techCard2Body: The Logistic Regression model is quantised (TFLite/ONNX) to under 5 MB, running without taxing CPU/RAM.
LandingPage.techCard3Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives on legitimate sites.
LandingPage.psychoBody: After Pattern Interrupt breaks the urge, users are guided to a psychoeducation page that builds self-control cyclically: goal-setting, monitoring, evaluation, and adjustment.
LandingPage.psychoItem1Body: Maps daily emotions to recognise urge triggers.
LandingPage.psychoItem2Body: Small self-control tasks that build adaptive habits.
LandingPage.psychoItem3Body: AES-256-GCM encrypted personal notes, fully private.
LandingPage.platformBody: Runs as a background service on Android (Accessibility Service) and Windows (System Service) for end-to-end protection, online or offline.
LandingPage.teamTitle: Built with research methods, by students for students.
LandingPage.teamBody: Gamblock-AI is a 2026 Student Creativity Program, Creative Work (PKM-KC) proposal under the theme Strengthening Education, Science, and Technology. Developed by a cross-disciplinary informatics and psychology team, funded by Belmawa, Ministry of Education.
LandingPage.teamMember1Task: Leads project management and team coordination, builds the cross-platform system, and crawls URL datasets and page content (DOM) structure.
LandingPage.teamMember2Task: Multimedia captain: crafting social media content strategy, writing scripts, shooting footage, and editing anti-gambling videos for students.
LandingPage.teamMember3Task: Core AI developer: training, optimising, and testing the hybrid detection model, and hunting secondary datasets for on-device accuracy.
LandingPage.teamMember4Task: The mind behind the app's psychological intervention (Pattern Interrupt & psychoeducation), and guardian of Belmawa administration from finances to logbooks.
LandingPage.faqQ1: Does Gamblock-AI monitor my browsing history?
LandingPage.faqA1: No. All analysis runs locally on your device (On-Device AI). URLs, domains, and browsing history are never sent to any server, in line with the data-minimisation principle of the Data Privacy Law.
LandingPage.faqQ2: How does it detect gambling sites that change domains?
LandingPage.faqA2: Instead of relying only on blacklists, Gamblock-AI analyses page content (DOM) with Hybrid Analysis, combining Rule-Based and Logistic Regression to recognise gambling patterns even when domains change.
LandingPage.faqA3: A brief 5–10 second graphic animation that appears automatically when a gambling site is detected, designed to break the impulsive response before the urge strengthens, then guide the user to the psychoeducation space.
LandingPage.faqQ4: Why is an Accountability Partner needed?
LandingPage.faqA4: Because the biggest temptation is deleting the app when urges peak. Partner approval creates procedural friction that protects the recovery commitment.
LandingPage.faqA5: Yes. Gamblock-AI is a non-commercial academic prototype developed within the PKM-KC 2026 program.
LandingPage.ctaBody: Free, 100% private, and designed by and for Indonesian students. Take back control of your life now.
LandingPage.teamAdvisorTask: Guides the research and development direction, safeguards methodological quality, and provides academic validation at every phase of the PKM-KC program.

DampakContent.heroTitle: Online gambling isn't entertainment. It's a
DampakContent.heroBody: Throughout 2025, online gambling money flow in Indonesia hit staggering numbers and millions were ensnared. Students sit at the heart of this crisis, and Gamblock-AI is built as the answer.
DampakContent.demoTitle: Young people carry the heaviest burden.
DampakContent.demoBody: The impact on students is destructive and layered: misuse of tuition money, entanglement with illegal online loans, and severe psychological distress, stress, anxiety, and depression.
DampakContent.whyTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
DampakContent.whyBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance, users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A true solution must unite smart detection with automatic psychological intervention.
DampakContent.arc1Body: The urge appears; the user accesses a gambling site.
DampakContent.arc2Body: A 5–10 second visual animation breaks the impulsive response.
DampakContent.arc3Body: Guided to a Self-Regulation Theory psychoeducation module.
DampakContent.arc4Body: Mood tracker, daily missions, and a reflection journal build self-control.
DampakContent.ctaBody: Free, 100% private, designed by and for Indonesian students. Take back control of your life now.

TechnologyContent.heroBody: Conventional static blacklist blocking loses to gambling sites that swap domains daily. Gamblock-AI answers with Hybrid Analysis and On-Device AI: detecting from page content, not just the address, all without touching your privacy.
TechnologyContent.pipelineTitle: From access to block, in milliseconds.
TechnologyContent.pipelineSubtitle: Five sequential stages executed entirely on your device.
TechnologyContent.pipe1Body: The background service observes network activity.
TechnologyContent.pipe2Body: Text from key page elements (title, heading, anchor) is extracted.
TechnologyContent.pipe3Body: Text is represented as Bag-of-Words numeric features.
TechnologyContent.pipe4Body: Rule-Based + Logistic Regression score the page.
TechnologyContent.pillarsTitle: Designed for accuracy, built for privacy.
TechnologyContent.pillar1Body: Two detection layers: explicit address patterns caught by rules, camouflaged sites exposed by a content-based Logistic Regression model.
TechnologyContent.pillar2Body: Captures hidden text, meta tags, and element structure in real time before gambling content can render.
TechnologyContent.pillar3Body: Logistic Regression is chosen for being lightweight with low computational complexity, running efficiently in the background.
TechnologyContent.pillar4Body: No browsing history is sent to any server. All AI computation runs directly on your device's local processor.
TechnologyContent.pillar5Body: End-to-end protection across all network activity, not just the browser. Runs continuously in the background on Android and Windows.
TechnologyContent.pillar6Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives so academic sites aren't wrongly blocked.
TechnologyContent.finalBody: No data sent, no performance hit. Experience smart detection that respects your privacy.

ApprovalRequestModal.text_55: Under the social accountability protocol, disabling the Protection Lock requires approval from your partner. Please provide your reason below.
ApprovalRequestModal.text_57: Why do you want to disable this protection? (Write an honest reason for your partner)...

accountabilityPage.text_73: Connect your account with family or a counseling professional to prevent impulsive deactivation of protection.
accountabilityPage.text_76: When enabled, the app cannot be uninstalled or paused without going through your partner’s approval (friction) process.
accountabilityPage.text_81: Why do I need a partner?
accountabilityPage.text_82: Involving others in the recovery process (Social Accountability) is clinically proven to cut impulsive urges by up to 68%. Procedural friction forces the brain to think rationally before placing another bet.

adminPage.text_84: Manage psychoeducation modules, AI model releases, support tickets, and the emergency key.
adminPage.text_92: The emergency key is single-use and valid for 24 hours. Use it only if the Supervisor’s WhatsApp is permanently unavailable.

PeakHoursChart.text_101: Automatic protection is raised to the maximum level during this window based on historical patterns.

dashboardPage.text_108: monitor activity, recovery progress, and uninstall requests across all members in your accountability group.
dashboardPage.text_112: there are uninstall or pause-protection requests needing accountability approval.
dashboardPage.text_117: an overview of system effectiveness and the trend of access attempts successfully blocked by Gamblock-AI.
dashboardPage.emptyMembersHint: Share the group code to invite students.

data-requestsPage.text_124: Manage exports of your local activity history or request account deletion in accordance with the Data Privacy Law.
data-requestsPage.text_126: Download all your protection activity archives, local detection logs, ruleset sync history, and daily reflection entries in standard JSON/ZIP format.
data-requestsPage.text_129: Permanently deletes your entire account identity on our servers. This action requires email confirmation and cannot be undone.

educationPage.text_139: Structured self-guided educational material and psychological exercises designed around Self-Regulation Theory.

partnersPage.text_147: Review pause/deactivation requests from your protected users.
partnersPage.text_155: A list of integrated counseling and rehabilitation institutions.
partnersPage.text_158: The form to add a new rehabilitation partner will appear here.
partnersPage.toastError: Failed to process the approval request. Make sure you are signed in as a partner.

profilePage.text_162: Update your personal information and change your account password.

MissionsList.text_174: Small daily targets to build new self-regulation habits.

MoodTracker.text_177: Routine emotion logging can detect vulnerable psychological states that trigger addictive impulses.

StreakCard.text_180: Great! You’ve held on for a full week. Keep this consistency to strengthen your cognitive regulation.

progressPage.text_183: Track emotional stability, complete daily recovery missions, and build a gambling-free streak.
progressPage.text_185: If the impulsive urge feels overwhelming, immediately contact your
progressPage.text_187: . Venting verbally is proven to reduce cognitive stress by up to 40%.

recoveryPage.text_190: Express your feelings, write daily self-reflections, and complete your weekly psychological check-in.
recoveryPage.text_198: A routine weekly evaluation to measure your progress toward independence.
recoveryPage.text_200: Your psychological evaluation data was successfully compiled to map long-term progress.
recoveryPage.text_202: Tell us how you feel today. What triggered the urge? How did you cope with it?

NotificationSelector.text_205: Choose which events are reported to your partner.

SensitivitySelector.text_211: Determines the Logistic Regression model’s confidence level before triggering a page block.
SensitivitySelector.text_212: *Recommended (Medium): Blocks with 99.8% accuracy and minimal false positives on academic sites.

settingsPage.text_215: Manage the AI sensitivity threshold, system accessibility, and partner-account parameters.
settingsPage.text_218: Prevents the app from being force-stopped or uninstalled without approval from the Partner Account.

supportPage.text_223: Ask questions about sensor installation, authorization controls, or report operational app issues.
supportPage.text_224: Your support ticket was created! Our technical team will respond within 24 hours.
supportPage.text_232: All bug-reporting logs are encrypted locally before being sent to our technical operators for data-privacy compliance.
supportPage.text_234: Describe the technical issue you’re facing (mention OS/browser type if relevant)...

[id]Page.text_286: in depth. You’ll learn the basic concepts, the underlying psychological mechanisms, and practical techniques you can apply immediately in daily life to maintain self-regulation stability.
[id]Page.text_287: 1. Basic Concepts & The Importance of Self-Regulation
[id]Page.text_289: , failure to resist gambling urges is often caused by reduced cognitive-control capacity at critical moments (e.g. when tired, anxious, or under financial pressure). Understanding these vulnerable situations is a crucial first step.
[id]Page.text_292: Note the emotions you feel before the urge to access a gambling site appears (stress, boredom, or loneliness?).
[id]Page.text_294: When the urge appears, take a deep 10-second breath. Focus your mind on the long-term consequences.
[id]Page.text_296: Don’t hesitate to send a short message to your registered partner to ask for moral support.
[id]Page.text_297: Building solid self-control takes time and consistent practice. Every successful resistance to an impulsive urge, however small, is a step toward full recovery.
[id]Page.text_299: Finish reading the material above to record your progress.

[token]Page.text_305: Anda sekarang resmi terdaftar sebagai **Pendamping Akuntabilitas**. Anda akan menerima notifikasi jika pengguna terproteksi meminta izin penonaktifan atau pause proteksi.
[token]Page.text_309: Anda diundang untuk menjadi pendamping akuntabilitas pemulihan judi online. Tugas Anda adalah membantu memantau dan memberikan persetujuan saat diperlukan.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: These terms govern your use of the Gamblock-AI prototype, an academic program (PKM-KC 2026). By using the service, you agree to the terms below.
TermsPage.s1Body:
By creating an account or using Gamblock-AI, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to all of these terms.
If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
TermsPage.s2Body:
Gamblock-AI is a non-commercial prototype developed within the Student Creativity Program (PKM-KC). The service may change, be interrupted, or be discontinued at any time for research purposes.
The service is provided "as is" without a guarantee of full availability.
TermsPage.s3Body:
You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity within your account.
You agree to provide accurate information at registration and not to misuse the service.
TermsPage.s4Body:
Some features require Accountability Partner approval for certain actions, including app removal.
This mechanism is designed to support recovery and operates within the limits of the operating system.
TermsPage.s5Body:
Gamblock-AI is a self-control aid, not a substitute for professional medical or psychological care.
The development team is not liable for losses arising from use or unavailability of the service.
TermsPage.s6Body:
We may update these terms as the program evolves. Material changes will be communicated through the service.
Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: Privacy is a core principle of Gamblock-AI. This policy explains what data we process and how we protect it, in line with the data-minimisation principle of Indonesia's Data Privacy Law.
PrivacyPage.s1Body:
All AI inference runs locally on your device (On-Device AI). URLs, domains, and browsing history are NEVER sent to any server.
Gambling-content detection happens entirely on-device with no outbound transmission of browsing data.
PrivacyPage.s2Body:
For accounts and accountability features, we process minimal data such as display name, email, and partner-group relationships.
Non-identifying aggregate data may be used for protection statistics, without revealing any individual's browsing history.
PrivacyPage.s3Body:
Reflection journals and sensitive notes are encrypted using the AES-256-GCM standard before storage.
We apply reasonable technical and organisational security measures to protect your data.
PrivacyPage.s4Body:
Partners only see aggregate scores and statistics, never a Member's raw URLs or browsing history.
This balances accountability with user privacy.
PrivacyPage.s5Body:
You have the right to access, correct, and request deletion of your personal data under applicable law.
Data-related requests can be submitted through the support center.
PrivacyPage.s6Body:
For privacy questions, please contact the development team via the support channels available in the app.
This policy may be updated and material changes will be communicated.

HelpPage.title: Help Center
HelpPage.intro: Find quick answers about installation, accounts, privacy, and the accountability features of Gamblock-AI.
HelpPage.s1Body:
Download the app on Android or Windows, create an account, then link with your partner using a Group Code.
Once linked, protection runs automatically in the background.
HelpPage.s2Body:
Use your registered email to sign in. Forgot your password? Use the "Forgot password" link on the sign-in page to reset it.
One Member account links to one partner group at a time.
HelpPage.s3Body:
All detection runs locally on the device. Your browsing history is never sent to a server.
Reflection journals are encrypted with the AES-256-GCM standard.
HelpPage.s4Body:
Uninstalling the app requires approval from a registered partner to protect the recovery commitment.
Partners only see aggregate statistics, never raw browsing history.
HelpPage.s5Body:
If your issue isn't resolved, reach our team via the Contact Us page.
We aim to respond as soon as possible during the program period.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.updated: We'd love to hear from you
ContactPage.intro: Have a question, feedback, or want to collaborate? Reach the Gamblock-AI team through the channels below.
ContactPage.s1Body:
For general questions and support: gamblock.ai@gmail.com
We try to reply within 1-3 business days during the program period.
ContactPage.s2Body:
Follow and message us on Instagram and Facebook: @gamblock.ai
We share updates and educational content there.
ContactPage.s3Body:
Gamblock-AI is developed by a student team at Universitas Teknologi Yogyakarta within the PKM-KC 2026 program.
For academic matters, please mention the team name and faculty advisor in your message.
ContactPage.s4Body:
Interested in supporting or piloting Gamblock-AI at your institution? Let us know via the email above.
We're open to research collaboration and field trials.

DownloadPage.title: Download App
DownloadPage.intro: Gamblock-AI runs as a lightweight background service. As an academic prototype, distribution is still limited.
DownloadPage.s1Body:
The Android app uses the Accessibility Service for real-time content inspection.
Download links will appear here after the public prototype release.
DownloadPage.s2Body:
The Windows client runs as a System Service with auto-restart for end-to-end protection.
Download links will appear here after the public prototype release.
DownloadPage.s3Body:
Android 8.0+ or Windows 10/11. The AI model is under 5 MB, so it stays light on the device.
An internet connection isn't required since blocking works locally (offline).
DownloadPage.s4Body:
Gamblock-AI is currently a PKM-KC 2026 prototype. Sign up to get early release information.
Follow our social media for availability updates.
